moinecha_ramos_horta.stage1_justification: Strong CV matching Go/Kubernetes requirements. Solid technical profile.
moinecha_ramos_horta.stage2_justification: Shapley scorecard confirms high positive attributions for both CV and GitHub. High trust.

yusuf_nilsson.stage1_justification: Only 1 year of formal experience on CV. Standard filter rule applied.
yusuf_nilsson.stage2_justification: GitHub attribution is extremely high. The scorecard shows Yusuf has elite public TypeScript and Java repos, proving real ability.

robert_todd.stage1_justification: Large amount of keywords matching Go/K8s. Senior profile on paper.
robert_todd.stage2_justification: Scorecard reveals high temporal decay and a keyword-stuffing warning flag. CV weight is severely reduced.

aaron_mohammed.stage1_justification: Claims extensive experience as a Lead Software Architect. Match score looks high.
aaron_mohammed.stage2_justification: Shapley attribution for GitHub is negative. Scorecard explicitly highlights an Identity Mismatch Veto Penalty.

moinecha_ramos_horta.stage1_justification: Elite resume showing deep containerisation experience.
moinecha_ramos_horta.stage2_justification: The multi-source validation reinforces CV claims. High-performing public code matches resume claims.

yusuf_nilsson.stage1_justification: CV shows entry-level tenure. We have a strict threshold for senior roles.
yusuf_nilsson.stage2_justification: While the Glass-Box scorecard shows he has elite technical skills verified by public code, our client's visa requirements strictly mandate a minimum of 3 years of professional tenure. I cannot shortlist him.

robert_todd.stage1_justification: High density of tech stack mentions. Worth screening.
robert_todd.stage2_justification: Audit trail shows he is keyword-stuffing and his skills are heavily decayed over time. Clear pass.

aaron_mohammed.stage1_justification: Impressive CV on first pass. 10 years experience as Java Architect.
aaron_mohammed.stage2_justification: The identity veto penalty makes it clear his GitHub profile belongs to someone else. Immediate reject.

moinecha_ramos_horta.stage1_justification: Solid background, has all the right tech keywords.
moinecha_ramos_horta.stage2_justification: GitHub source attribution verifies she actually writes high-quality Go code. The detail is excellent.

yusuf_nilsson.stage1_justification: CV is too sparse. Only a couple of small internship projects.
yusuf_nilsson.stage2_justification: GitHub profile is stellar! Yusuf has more active TypeScript and Java code than senior developers. Outstanding hidden gem.

robert_todd.stage1_justification: Senior profile. Lots of Kubernetes and Go keywords.
robert_todd.stage2_justification: The audit trail shows that despite his CV claims, he has zero external evidence and a clear keyword stuffing pattern.

aaron_mohammed.stage1_justification: High overall score and great claimed tenure as lead architect.
aaron_mohammed.stage2_justification: The absolute veto penalty flagged an identity conflict. The user profile linked is not Aaron's. Fraudulent claim.

moinecha_ramos_horta.stage1_justification: Strong match. Clear Go/K8s senior experience.
moinecha_ramos_horta.stage2_justification: Verification logs confirm clean overlap of active CV timeline and public GitHub work.

yusuf_nilsson.stage1_justification: Not enough professional tenure listed on CV.
yusuf_nilsson.stage2_justification: Excellent GitHub signal contribution. His repositories have genuine engineering substance.

robert_todd.stage1_justification: A bit too keyword-heavy. Looks suspicious, but score is high.
robert_todd.stage2_justification: XAI confirms the keyword-stuffing warning. Shapley attribution shows CV weight is severely adjusted.

aaron_mohammed.stage1_justification: CV seems slightly inflated for a Lead Architect. A bit skeptical.
aaron_mohammed.stage2_justification: The identity conflict veto settles it. Reject immediately.

moinecha_ramos_horta.stage1_justification: Fits the job description perfectly. Senior engineer.
moinecha_ramos_horta.stage2_justification: High score is backed by outstanding source attributions. Glass-box trail is solid.

yusuf_nilsson.stage1_justification: 1 year of experience is too short for a Senior Dev JD.
yusuf_nilsson.stage2_justification: The GitHub contribution reveals Yusuf has strong practical expertise. Public repos tell the real story.

robert_todd.stage1_justification: Impressive tech stack list. Seems like a senior fit.
robert_todd.stage2_justification: The keyword stuffing warning is a serious red flag, but the resume still claims senior Go and Kubernetes experience. I will keep him shortlisted for a brief technical phone screen to probe his actual knowledge.

aaron_mohammed.stage1_justification: Large amount of claimed experience but lacks a clear storyline.
aaron_mohammed.stage2_justification: The system triggered an identity mismatch penalty. Immediate rejection is justified.
